highlights: Re-established the codebase on a clean React/TypeScript/Vite baseline to reduce legacy drag.
Prioritized dev speed and maintainability before layering product complexity.
Used v3 as a deliberate architecture reset to de-risk future feature migration.
impact: Created a cleaner implementation surface for future product expansion with less accumulated technical friction.
one_liner: Third-generation front-end foundation focused on cleaner architecture and faster iteration.
problem: Earlier iterations carried enough structural complexity to slow delivery and increase maintenance overhead.
solution: Started a reset codebase with stricter baseline standards and a simpler structure for incremental feature rebuilds.
title: Rxion v3
visibility_note: Core repository is private. This entry summarizes architecture and working approach without exposing proprietary source.
